nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.grounding_span: if AI helped me find every relevant paper and summarise it without me feeling like I've missed any key points then I would be happy

nodes.label: AI as NMR data resolver
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for novel chemistry
nodes.grounding_span: I would sometimes ask for help in resolving NMR data, which is maybe where it's more helpful as it has the answer in front of it

nodes.label: AI as source of pride and ownership
nodes.label_negative: AI as enabler of personal achievement
nodes.grounding_span: using AI feels like a cheap cop-out that devalues your hard work

nodes.label: Human expertise as invaluable for cutting-edge research
nodes.label_negative: AI as capable of independent research

nodes.label: Personal accomplishment and satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: I pride myself on my ability to find answers myself: that's why I do the research I do

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: find every relevant paper and summarise it without me feeling like I've missed any key points

nodes.label: Trustworthy and accurate outputs
nodes.grounding_span: AI would hallucinate answers to things, suggest structures which are chemically impossible

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: if AI helped me find every relevant paper and summarise it without me feeling like I've missed any key points then I would be happy

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI-generated writing
nodes.grounding_span: I couldn't use it for anything other than asking it to suggest structures

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI for NMR data resolution
nodes.grounding_span: I would sometimes ask for help in resolving NMR data, which is maybe where it's more helpful

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see how it will be functional for a scientific researcher unless it can actually do the research itself

nodes.label: Pride-driven self-reliance in problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I pride myself on my ability to find answers myself

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach
nodes.grounding_span: I will always look elsewhere as well, to make sure I'm not 100% reliant on an answer that may be completely wrong
